description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. Detailed and very neat. Mentions a sum of 45 dinars. Mentions people such as: Abū l-Faraj, al-Faqīh Ibn Manṣūr al-Ḥarīrī, al-Ḥājj Ibrāhīm the partner of Hunayd, Jamāl al-Dīn ʿUmar (of Funduq al-Būrī?), Dā'ūd b. Naba, Yūsuf al-Ṣabbāgh, Nuṣayr b. ʿAlī, and al-Shaykh al-Rashīd. On verso there are further accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals, and Hebrew pen trials.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
